worldData.instructions:
MOVE — the sun follows your cursor; all of its light comes with it.
Time passes on its own — the sun slowly ages to moonlight and back.
CLICK & HOLD — time races.

The point: there is no goal. The valley is yours to light — stars and fireflies come with the moon.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: HELIOS: the Held Sun — drag carries it, holding ages it day\u2194moon, release freezes the sky.

visualTypes.name: helios
